mapper.select: SELECT P.PUSH_NO, P.PUSH_NAME, P.PUSH_TIME, P.DAY_OF_WEEK, P.TRANSPORT_TYPE, R.START_NAME, R.END_NAME, R.START_STATION, R.END_STATION, P.IS_ACTIVE FROM PUSH P JOIN ROUTE R ON P.ROUTE_NO = R.ROUTE_NO WHERE P.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY P.PUSH_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE PUSH SET IS_ACTIVE = CASE WHEN #{isActive} = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE PUSH_NO = #{pushNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: SELECT FLOOR( AVG( (FLOOR(PUSH_TIME / 100) * 60) + MOD(PUSH_TIME, 100) ) ) FROM PUSH WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_NO
